item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response treats the prompt as a straightforward metric trend and vendor-switch decision problem. It provides a direct decision framework: attribution, segmentation, severity checks, path options, thresholds, and a recommendation to pilot before full migration. It does not fire triage, does not frame the situation as repeated local repair pressure, and does not over-methodize."}
